content: I'm a Data Science master's candidate at Middle Tennessee State University, currently sitting at a 4.00 GPA. My work covers the full lifecycle of an AI system, from cleaning and engineering the data to training and fine-tuning models to actually getting them into production.

Right now I'm mostly focused on Generative AI, things like RAG pipelines, LLM fine-tuning, and deep learning models for computer vision and signal detection. I've worked on this through internships at NeuralForge AI and SlashMark, plus my current graduate assistantship at MTSU.
I also published a paper at ICSADL 2024 on a visible light based indoor positioning system, alongside two other academic projects on IoT health monitoring.

highlights.title: Generative AI & RAG
highlights.description: LangChain, vector databases, and LLM fine-tuning for document intelligence and internal Q&A.

highlights.title: Deep Learning & CV
highlights.description: CNN and Transformer models for medical imaging, gravitational wave detection, and multi-camera tracking.

highlights.title: MLOps & Data Engineering
highlights.description: AWS, Docker, MLflow, and REST APIs, with pipelines and BI dashboards in Power BI and Tableau.

highlights.title: Published Researcher
highlights.description: 1 IEEE paper on visible light indoor positioning, plus 2 academic projects on IoT health monitoring.
